message:
fix(reliability): add setTimeout cleanup to more copy button components

Add proper timeout cleanup on unmount to prevent memory leaks:
- command-card.tsx: CommandCard and CodeBlock components
- lesson-components.tsx: CodeBlock and CommandList components
- flywheel-visualization.tsx: ToolDetailPanel component

This is part of a systematic fix for the setTimeout pattern across
the codebase to ensure all copy feedback timers are properly cleaned
up when components unmount.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
